name: Reconnaissance Activity with Nltest
description: Detects possible reconnaissance activity via the nltest binary.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the process.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the `nltest.exe` executable.

parameters.name: process_command_line
parameters.description: The full command line executed, including reconnaissance-related parameters like `/server`, `/query`, `/dclist`, `/domain_trusts`, `/trusted_domains`, `/user`, or `/parentdomain`.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which `nltest.exe` was executed.
